generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks show we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but responsible expansion - with proper oversight - is what keeps our families safe. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
